title: Personal Portfolio Website
description: A personal website built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to showcase my resume, projects, and GitHub data.

title: GitHub API Profile Stats
description: A JavaScript project that fetches public GitHub profile data from an API and displays profile statistics dynamically on a webpage.

title: Dynamic Projects Page
description: A projects page that loads project information from a JSON file and renders project cards dynamically using reusable JavaScript functions.

title: Resume/CV Webpage
description: A resume page created with semantic HTML sections and styled with CSS for layout, readability, and responsive design.

title: Dark Mode Website Toggle
description: A website feature that allows users to switch between light mode, dark mode, and automatic color scheme settings.

title: Projects Grid Layout
description: A responsive project gallery using CSS Grid to organize project cards cleanly across different screen sizes.

title: Abortion Access Visualization
description: A data visualization project comparing abortion access and abortion rates across states to explore different arguments about policy effectiveness.

title: Cache Performance Analysis
description: A systems performance assignment analyzing row-major and column-major memory traversal using runtime measurements and cache behavior.

title: SoCalGuessr Image Classifier
description: A machine learning project that classifies Southern California city images using transfer learning and convolutional neural networks.

title: Motor Imagery BCI Transfer Learning
description: A research-style project exploring transfer learning for EEG-based motor imagery brain-computer interfaces across datasets with different channel setups.

title: Menu Match Food Classifier
description: A binary image classification project focused on identifying Asian food images versus other food categories.

title: PCA Eigenfaces Assignment
description: A data science assignment using principal component analysis to reduce dimensionality and analyze face image data.
